sequence.name: SubscriberAuthorizationBusinessControlSequence

property.name: auth.error.message
property.value: The APIM gateway did not provide a valid authenticated subject context.

property.name: auth.error.message
property.value: The authenticated user is not assigned to a supported telco business persona.

property.name: auth.error.message
property.value: Product managers may inspect commercial usage but may not invoke subscriber network controls.

property.name: auth.error.message
property.value: A partner may not access another partner's subscriber or commercial data.

filter.xpath: get-property('persona') = 'partner' and not(contains(concat(',', get-property('authorized.countries'), ','), concat(',', get-property('requested.country'), ',')))

property.name: auth.error.message
property.value: The partner is not contractually authorized for the requested country.

property.name: auth.error.message
property.value: Subscriber-related controls require a purpose and active consent reference.

property.name: auth.error.message
property.value: The consent reference does not cover the requested partner and subscriber.

property.name: auth.error.message
property.value: The consent reference does not cover the requested partner and subscriber.

filter.xpath: (get-property('capability') = 'number-verification' and not(get-property('requested.purpose') = 'number-verification' or get-property('requested.purpose') = 'fraud-prevention' or get-property('requested.purpose') = 'fraud-investigation')) or (get-property('capability') = 'sim-swap' and not(get-property('requested.purpose') = 'sim-swap-check' or get-property('requested.purpose') = 'fraud-prevention' or get-property('requested.purpose') = 'fraud-investigation')) or (get-property('capability') = 'device-location' and not(get-property('requested.purpose') = 'device-location-verification' or get-property('requested.purpose') = 'fraud-prevention' or get-property('requested.purpose') = 'fraud-investigation')) or (get-property('capability') = 'qod' and not(get-property('requested.purpose') = 'qod-fulfilment'))

property.name: auth.error.message
property.value: The declared purpose is not permitted for this capability.
